creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Created attachment 195408
net-mgmt/py-pysmi: Upgrade to 0.3.1

Changelog
=========

*   Upgrade to 0.3.1


QA
==

portlint: OK
poudriere: OK -- testport on 11.2-RELEASE amd64 w/py27 (default), py34, py35, py36, py37

The three test failures are because net-mgmt/py-snmp4 is too old (4.3.2 < 4.3.10) for the tests [0]. However, because that is only a test dependency, I do not consider it a lien against this upgrade.

[0] https://github.com/etingof/pysmi/commit/4f38bd4f2235ff50faa1dc69228be752b591b58e
